name: Smoke of Deceit
description: The charlatan wizard Myrddin's only true contribution to the arcane arts.

abilities.name: Disguise
abilities.description: While still disguised, any allied unit that comes within proximity of the caster also gets the buff applied to them. Cooldown: 1. Application Radius: 1200. Dispel Radius: 1025. Move Speed Bonus: 15%. Duration: 45. Proximity Radius: 300. Can be used directly from the backpack, and the 6-second penalty cooldown does not apply to Smoke of Deceit.
